_comment: TRUSTED ground truth. Each entry verified by a human/independent vision model viewing the frame UPRIGHT (rotated 180 from stored). 'true' is the real 9-digit meter reading. 'stored_label' is what the pipeline banked (may be WRONG — that's the point). Do NOT auto-generate this file from the pipeline; that would be circular.

frames.note: POISONED: middle 100 banked as 110 during ratchet bug
